factions.name: Team Permafrost
factions.philosophy: The world has grown chaotic and impure. Only by converting all Pokémon to the clarity and permanence of Ice can true order be achieved. The Aurora Shrine holds the key.
factions.motivation: Weaponize the Aurora Shrine's glacial energy to trigger a global forced Ice-type evolution event.

known_members.notes: Commands the eastern outpost. Efficient and ruthless.
Grunts patrol routes and the eastern outpost. Use Ice-type Pokémon.

factions.notes: Team Permafrost leader identity is a late-game reveal. Do not name them until the Aurora Shrine summit.
